genre_refs: Emanuel Leutze 'Westward the Course of Empire Takes Its Way' (Manifest Destiny history painting)
description: Poster from the Department of Labor that overlays a single white serif slogan onto a reproduction of Emanuel Leutze's painting 'Westward the Course of Empire Takes Its Way.' The painting depicts a crowd of 19th-century pioneers and frontiersmen, including a mother and child figure, on a rocky mountain ridge at sunset, one figure at the peak gesturing westward, with covered wagons and a hazy valley below. A small white DOL eagle emblem sits centered above the bottom text. Across the lower portion, in large white serif capitals, the slogan reads 'AMERICANISM WILL PREVAIL.' The tweet adds 'The Future Belongs to the Rugged Individualist'.
notable_text: AMERICANISM WILL PREVAIL (caption adds: The Future Belongs to the Rugged Individualist; 'Westward the Course of Empire Takes Its Way' - Emanuel Leutze)
